title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience exceeds 7+ requirement, Fintech aligns with strong fit profile, Salesforce expertise confirmed, and Tel Aviv/hybrid location is ideal. Only minor gap is no explicit mention of $30M+ ARR scaling in profile, though seniority level suggests this.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and thought of you immediately—a well-funded cloud cost management platform scaling globally with Tel Aviv roots is exactly the kind of high-growth B2B SaaS environment where you've built RevOps engines before. Your 15+ years of Salesforce-driven GTM optimization and track record building operational backbone for complex, multi-region sales orgs seems tailor-made for what the CRO needs here.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. Partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, conducting quantitative and qualitative analyses aligning territories with business goals and headcount plans. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS GTM models, sales territories, and segmentation strategies, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), Salesforce proficiency, and experience with territory management tools (Fullcast, Pigment, Anaplan). Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and GTM optimization are core competencies, though specific territory management tool experience (Fullcast/Pigment/Anaplan) would need validation.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years building scalable GTM operations in B2B SaaS. I've redesigned territory models and sales processes across multiple hypergrowth phases, and I'm impressed by Gong's approach to making revenue teams data-driven. Your RevOps Manager role aligns perfectly with how I think about territory optimization and cross-functional alignment between Sales, Strategy, and Finance.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a SaaS platform for grant fundraising automation, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating new data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or GTM Systems at B2B SaaS, strong technical skills (SQL, APIs, complex workflows), CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), data architecture/integration experience, and an analytical mindset. Target salary $120,000-$170,000 USD plus equity.
score_reason: Exceptional match for a senior RevOps executive: the role's focus on CRM architecture, AI-native GTM implementation, and technical data infrastructure aligns perfectly with Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps. HubSpot preference, builder mentality, and analytics-driven approach are core strengths, though the 3-5 year requirement is well below his seniority level.
ai_opener: Instrumentl's RevOps Manager role caught my attention—building a modern revenue data architecture while leading AI tool implementation across sales is exactly the kind of strategic technical work I've been focused on for the past 15 years in B2B SaaS. Your vision of automating grant fundraising resonates with my experience scaling GTM infrastructure at growth-stage companies, and I'd be excited to discuss how I could architect a HubSpot ecosystem that becomes a competitive advantage for your revenue team.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: Warp, a fast-growing AI development startup with 700k+ active developers, seeks its first Revenue Operations leader to work across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to make the funnel predictable, efficient, and scalable. Responsibilities include lead routing/enrichment, building workflows to maximize conversion, owning lead scoring and pipeline hygiene, and operationalizing PQL scoring. Requires 4-8+ years at B2B SaaS orgs, ideally with PLG motion, hands-on CRM ownership, and the ability to diagnose funnel issues quickly. Backed by Sequoia Capital.
score_reason: Excellent match for Omri's RevOps expertise—building predictable funnels, pipeline hygiene, and lead scoring are core competencies.
